game_info.title: OneBit Dungeon
game_info.concept:
Survive endless dungeons in this turn-based roguelike RPG!

App Store URL: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/onebit-adventure/id1481297211

================================================================================
Full Description:
================================================================================

Survive endless dungeons in this turn-based roguelike RPG!
OneBit Adventure is a pixel dungeon crawler where every step is a strategy. Battle monsters, collect loot, and level up unique classes to see how far you can go.

Choose your hero — Warrior, Wizard, Necromancer, Archer, and more — each with unique abilities and playstyles. Explore caves, castles, and the underworld in a world that never ends. Every run is different, every fight a test of survival.

Why You’ll Love It:

Classic turn-based roguelike RPG gameplay

Multiple character classes with unique skills and builds

Endless dungeon crawling with loot and gear upgrades

One-handed controls — easy to play anywhere

Hardcore permadeath mode for roguelike veterans

Global leaderboards and competitive rewards

Play offline or online anytime

Retro 8-bit pixel art with modern polish

If you enjoy roguelike adventures like Shattered Pixel Dungeon or survival RPGs like Vampire Survivors, you’ll feel right at home.

Download OneBit Adventure today and start your roguelike journey! How long can you survive?
game_info.description:
"OneBit Dungeon" is a turn-based roguelike RPG where every step counts.
Explore procedurally generated dungeons, battle monsters, and collect gold to increase your score.
Choose between different hero classes with unique stats.
Navigate the grid based world, but be careful: when you move, enemies move.
Find the stairs to descend deeper into the dungeon. How deep can you go?
game_info.controls:
- Arrow Keys: Move your character (Up, Down, Left, Right) or attack enemies by bumping into them.
- Space: Wait a turn (skip movement) / Interact with stairs.
- Z: Use Health Potion (if available).
- Enter: Start Game / Select Class.
- R: Restart Game (from Game Over screen).
- Esc: Pause / Resume.

TEST_1.test_description: Test basic exploration and stair seeking behavior.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The test controller will identify the location of the stairs or unexplored tiles and move the player towards them. It avoids enemies if health is low.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The player successfully navigates the grid, uncovers map areas, and potentially reaches the next level or survives for at least 100 turns.

TEST_2.strategy_description: The test controller moves directly towards the nearest enemy to engage in combat. It uses potions when health drops below 30%.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The player engages enemies, deals damage, takes damage, and eventually dies or clears the floor. Success is defined by state changes in health and score.

TEST_3.strategy_description: The controller attempts to move randomly, including into walls. This verifies that invalid moves are blocked and do not consume a turn efficiently.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Player position remains valid (not inside walls) at all times.
